visual_summary: HeroDitheringDemo is a demo component that showcases a hero section with animated visuals and badges. It is used to demonstrate the HeroDithering component and its various props. Developers would use this component when building a hero section with interactive visuals and badges.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready hero component with the following characteristics:

Name: hero-dithering-demo
Description: HeroDitheringDemo is a demo component that showcases a hero section with animated visuals and badges. It is used to demonstrate the HeroDithering component and its various props. Developers would use this component when building a hero section with interactive visuals and badges.
Style: glassmorphism
Interactions: animated
Tags: hero, dithering, animated, badges

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
